titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of TNA DL 41/104

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=870 status=live modified=2021-04-07 09:25:03.429098+00 | translation moa=871 status=live modified=2021-04-07 14:51:18.988047+00

div.p:
Omnibus ad quos presens Scriptum peruenerit Rob’ de brus Salutem . Sciatis me dedisse et concessisse et hac presenti carta mea
confirmasse
Rogero Crispin terram de Cnocculeran in excambium terre sue de Kinemund et dimidie carucate terre
quam tenuit in feodo de Moffet illam scilicet que est iuxta Elrebec per has diuisas nominatas scilicet de blake
bec sub thornthuait usque ad mussam que est sursum blakebec et sic iuxta mussam illam usque ad blindthuait
et sic de blindthuait usque ad Malroser et sic per riuulam de Malroser usque in polraban et sic de Polraban
iuxta viridem uiam usque ad sepem de Holthuait et sic per sepem illum usque ad threpland et sic usque ad diuisas
terre Hugonis Hendeman . et sicut diuise ille cadunt in blakebec tenendam de me et heredibus meis sibi et heredibus
suis in feodo et hereditate libere et quiete plene et honorifice cum communi pastura daltone et parue daltone
et Musefald et omnibus aliis aisiamentis ad predictam terram pertinentibus Predictus uero Roger et heredes sui edificabunt
et sartabunt infra diuisas prescripte terre . et omnibus modis quibus poterunt terram illam infra diuisas suas ad opus suum
appropriabunt . Hanc predictam terram tenebunt Sepedictus Roger et heredes sui de me et heredibus meis quiete et ho
norifice ab omni consuetudine et ab omni demanda faciendo vicesimam partem seruicii vnius Militis hiis Test’
Ric’ Cumin . Henrico filio Comitis Dauit . Willelmo de H[er]ice . Roberto de Crossebi . Hugone de Corri . Ricardo de Houmet .
Iohann de sancto Iohanne Laurencio de berkelai . Rob' Capellano et Multis aliis .

p.cl: Omnibus ad Quos presens scriptum peruenerit Rob' de brus Salutem
To all to whom the present writing shall have come Robert de Brus sends greeting.

Know me to have given and granted and by this my present charter to have made firm to Roger Crispin the land of 'Cnocculeran' in exchange for his land of Kinmount and half a ploughgate of land which he held in the feu of Moffat, that is to say, that which is near Elrebec, by these named boundaries, that is, from Blakebec below Thornthwaite up to the moss which is above Blakebec, and thus near that moss up to Blindthwaite, and thus from Blindthwaite up to Malroser, and thus along the stream from Malroser to the Polraban, and thus from Polraban near the green road as far as the hedge of Holthwaite, and thus by that hedge as far as Threpland, and thus as far as the boundary of the land of Hugh Hendeman, ans as those boundaries fall into Blakebec; to be held of me and my heirs by him and his heirs in feu and heritage freely and quitly, fully and honourably, with common pasture of Dalton, Little Dalton and Mouswald, and all other easements pertaining to the aforesaid land. The aforesaid Roger and his heirs shall build and plough within the aforewritten boundaries of the land, and by all means by which they are able they shall assign the land within their own boundaries for their own use. This aforesaid land shall the oft-mentioned Roger and his heirs hold of me and my heirs quitly and honourably from every custom and from every demand performing the twentieth part of the service of one knight.

With these witnesses: Richard Comyn, Henry son of Earl David; William de Heriz; Robert of Crosbie; Hugh of Corrie; Richard de Houmet; John of St John; Laurence of Berkeley; Robert the chaplain; and many others.
To all to whom the present writing shall have come Robert de Brus sends greeting.
